title: The Unsolved Mystery of the Axeman of New Orleans

segments.text: Between 1918 and 1919, an unknown killer terrorized New Orleans.
Victims were attacked in their homes, often while they slept.
The killer would leave an axe at the crime scene.

visual.prompt: axe on the floor near a doorway

segments.text: He famously sent a letter to the press, claiming he would kill again.
Despite numerous suspects, the case remains unsolved.
The Axeman has become a chilling figure of urban legend.
Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: An unknown killer haunted New Orleans in the early 20th century, leaving behind a chilling mystery. Follow for daily cold cases! 🕵️‍♂️
